reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 18.5% and 20-day momentum is 33.4%.
Trend quality is supported by 80% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 21.7% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 3.3%, downside volatility near 1.7%, and a recent max drawdown of 3.3%.
Volume confirmation is 93.2% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 18.8% versus SPY over 5 days and 21.2% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is bullish with score 0.89, confidence 0.86, and 1.0 weighted articles across 4 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.89, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 4 articles across 4 sources, 1.0 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.98, average source quality 0.83, confidence 0.86.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC 0.00).
Price action and news are pointing in the same direction, which raises trust in the setup.
Overall model score is 0.319 with high confidence.
